user.title: Set up Surplus Load Switch
user.description: Select sensors for your PV system and battery storage.

menu_options.add_climate_device: Add a climate-controlled device (e.g. pool heat pump with no on/off switch)
menu_options.add_wallbox: Add a wallbox (power subtracted only, never switched)

add_normal_device.title: Add switchable device
add_normal_device.description: Currently {count} device(s) configured. Priority 1 = served first.

data.name: Name
data.avg_power_kw: Estimated power (kW) — replaced by measurement once enough data exists
data.schedule_entity: Time window helper (optional — a schedule.* entity; if set, takes priority over the fields below and supports multiple daily blocks / weekdays)
data.window_start: Time window start — only used if no helper above is set (leave empty for no restriction)
data.window_end: Time window end — outside this window the device is only ever turned off, e.g. for a pool pump on its own daily schedule
data.min_daily_runtime_h: Minimum daily runtime (h, optional) — from the afternoon onward, forces the device on (even without surplus) if it hasn't reached this yet today
data.depends_on_device_id: Depends on device (optional) — this device is only ever turned on while the selected one is also on (e.g. a heat pump that needs its circulation pump running first)

add_wallbox.title: Add wallbox
add_wallbox.description: Wallboxes with their own PV-surplus charging logic are never switched by Surplus Load Switch — only their power is subtracted from the house load so they don't distort the surplus calculation for other devices.

add_climate_device.title: Add climate-controlled device
add_climate_device.description: Currently {count} device(s) configured. For devices with no on/off switch — only a thermostat-style mode (e.g. a pool heat pump). "On" sets the chosen mode below; "off" sets hvac_mode to off.

data.name: Name
data.climate_on_mode: Mode to set when turning on (e.g. "heat")
data.avg_power_kw: Estimated power (kW) — replaced by measurement once enough data exists
data.schedule_entity: Time window helper (optional — a schedule.* entity; if set, takes priority over the fields below and supports multiple daily blocks / weekdays)
data.window_start: Time window start — only used if no helper above is set (leave empty for no restriction)
data.window_end: Time window end — outside this window the device is only ever turned off, e.g. for a pool pump on its own daily schedule
data.min_daily_runtime_h: Minimum daily runtime (h, optional) — from the afternoon onward, forces the device on (even without surplus) if it hasn't reached this yet today
data.depends_on_device_id: Depends on device (optional) — this device is only ever turned on while the selected one is also on (e.g. a heat pump that needs its circulation pump running first)

add_normal_device.description: Currently {count} device(s) configured. Priority 1 = served first.

add_wallbox.title: Add wallbox
add_wallbox.description: Wallboxes with their own PV-surplus charging logic are never switched by Surplus Load Switch — only their power is subtracted from the house load so they don't distort the surplus calculation for other devices.

edit_device.title: Edit device
edit_device.description: Change the selected device's values (e.g. priority).
